exact_quote: 9 trails consisting of 5 beginner and 4 intermediate trails ... 47 skiable acres ... one double chair lift (Lift 4), a Double Chair Riblet Tramway manufactured and installed in 1981 ... vertical drop is 300 feet, with a base elevation of 9,246 feet ... average annual snowfall is 250 inches ... 2025-2026 season opened December 20, 2025 and closes March 29, 2026 ... 1,500 feet of vertical drop for backcountry skiing and ski touring on adjacent USFS land
notes: Cuchara Foundation / Indy Pass / Uncover Colorado: 9 trails, 1 double chair lift (Lift 4), 300ft lift-served vert, 9,246ft base, 47 acres, 250in snow. 2025-26 season Dec 20 - Mar 29. Backcountry skiing 1,500ft vert on USFS land. Community-based nonprofit; COS (Colorado Springs) is nearest commercial airport (~110mi). Trinidad-Las Animas (TAD) is closest GA strip but not commercial.

exact_quote: three lifts which serve the trails at the skiway, including the Winslow Mountain Quad, the Holt's Ledge Double, and the Magic Carpet Beginner Lift ... lift-served summit elevation of 1,943 feet (592 m) above sea level and a base elevation of 975 feet (297 m), yielding a vertical drop of 968 feet (295 m) ... The closest major airport is Lebanon Municipal Airport, approximately 20 minutes away
notes: Wikipedia: 3 lifts (Winslow Mtn Quad + Holts Ledge Double + Magic Carpet), 968ft vert, 975-1,943ft elev. Snow depth 30-50in average. Lebanon Municipal LEB ~20 min closest; MHT (Manchester) 112 min for commercial.

exact_quote: Deer Valley has 29 lifts, including gondolas, high-speed sixes, and surface lifts ... 3 new lifts in the 2024/25 season and 7 new lifts in 2025/26 ... vertical drop is 3,040 ft with a summit elevation of 9,570 ft ... averages 260 inches of annual snowfall, though another source indicates the average ski season snowfall is 300 inches ... 40 min drive from SLC airport, with Deer Valley located approximately 36 highway miles from the Salt Lake International Airport
notes: OnTheSnow/Wikipedia: 29 lifts post 2025-26 expansion, 3,040ft vert, 9,570 summit, 300in average. SLC 36 mi. Major luxury resort: lodging on-mountain confirmed.

exact_quote: 210-foot vertical drop and 45 acres of skiable terrain ... 21 runs to explore with 2 triple chairlifts and 2 Magic Carpets in the Learn to Ski and Ride area ... SCHEELS Terrain Park features its own high speed tow rope ... snowmaking on 100% of the terrain ... Landslide Tubing Park with its own Magic Carpet ... New for the 2025-2026 winter season is a lit Nordic Ski loop along with snowmaking capabilities
notes: Detroit Mountain Recreation Area (Detroit Lakes, MN): 210ft vert, 45 acres, 21 runs, 2 triple chairs + 2 magic carpets = 4 lifts, 100% snowmaking. Tubing + new XC Nordic loop 2025-26. Fargo FAR is nearest major airport (~50mi). DUPLICATE of slug 'detroit-mountain' - same facility.

exact_quote: 210-foot vertical drop and 45 acres of skiable terrain ... 21 runs to explore with 2 triple chairlifts and 2 Magic Carpets in the Learn to Ski and Ride area ... SCHEELS Terrain Park features its own high speed tow rope ... snowmaking on 100% of the terrain ... Landslide Tubing Park with its own Magic Carpet ... New for the 2025-2026 winter season is a lit Nordic Ski loop along with snowmaking capabilities
notes: DUPLICATE of slug 'detroit' - same Detroit Mountain Recreation Area in Detroit Lakes, MN. Suggest dedupe in stage 24.

exact_quote: 16 lifts (10 chair lifts and 6 surface lifts) with 152 metres (500 feet) of vertical descent ... average of 32 inches of annual snowfall. All trails at Devil's Head are covered by snowmaking ... season runs from December 11, 2026 to March 7, 2027 ... 30 trails across 260 acres ... The closest airport is Dane County Regional Airport (MSN) in Madison, just 40-50 minutes away
notes: Wikipedia/J2Ski: 16 lifts (10 chair + 6 surface), 500ft vert, 32in snow, 100% snowmaking, 30 trails, 260 acres. Season Dec 11 - Mar 7 (2026-27). MSN Madison ~40-50min. Resort hotel/lodging on-site.

exact_quote: 6 chairlifts, plus one surface lift (only used by the ski/snowboard school). Specifically, there is 1 High Speed Quad, 2 Quad Chairs, 3 Double Chairs, and 1 Surface Lift ... summit elevation is 8,540 feet above sea level, yielding a vertical drop of 1,840 feet ... average annual snowfall of about 325 inches ... season ranges from December to April ... The nearest airport to Diamond Peak is Reno Tahoe, 40 minutes drive away
notes: Wikipedia: 7 lifts total (6 chair + 1 surface), 1 high-speed quad, 1,840ft vert, 8,540 summit, 325in snow. Lake Tahoe Incline Village; RNO 40min. No on-mountain lodging (Incline Village hotels).

exact_quote: access to eight lifts to help guests get around both peaks ... Discovery has 2388 feet of vertical drop ... average annual snowfall of 215 inches ... high base elevation of Discovery Ski Area (6480 feet) along with its location in a known 'cold pocket' of Montana inhibiting melting ... extending lift operations until the month of April ... Bert Mooney Public Airport is located nearby in Butte ... Butte is 45 miles to the southeast of Discovery Ski Area
notes: Wikipedia/BigSkyFishing: 8 lifts, 2,388ft vert, 6,480 base, 215in snow, late season into April. BTM (Butte/Bert Mooney) ~45mi; BZN (Bozeman Yellowstone) 120mi. Philipsburg/Anaconda MT.

exact_quote: Dodge Ridge has 12 lifts across 862 skiable acres ... 1,600 vertical feet of skiable terrain ... average snowfall over 350" each season ... winter sports season typically lasts from late November through mid April ... closest airport to Dodge Ridge Ski Area is Oakland International Airport, 145 miles away. Sacramento International Airport is almost the exact same distance from the ski area, as is Reno-Tahoe International Airport – 148 miles away
notes: Wikipedia/MtnScoop: 12 lifts, 862 acres, 1,600ft vert, 350in snow, late Nov - mid April season. OAK 145mi (SMF and RNO equidistant). Pinecrest CA Stanislaus NF. No on-mountain lodging.

exact_quote: Nordic trail system features 30 kilometers of groomed trails spanning private land and Stillwater State Forest ... trails are groomed for both skate and classic cross country skiing as well as trails for snowshoeing and fat biking ... ski shop, full coffee bar/restaurant ... groomed daily for XC pursuits mid-December through March with Skate, Classic, Fat bike, and Snowshoe Trails
notes: Nordic XC center - no alpine lifts. 30km groomed trails (skate/classic), snowshoe/fat-bike welcome. Mid-Dec to March season. On-site lodge (Dog Creek Lodge) = lodging on mountain. Olney MT, near Whitefish; FCA (Glacier Park Intl) closest commercial.

exact_quote: Donner Ski Ranch has 5 double and 1 triple chairlifts, for a total of 8 lifts ... vertical drop is 800 feet, with a summit elevation of 7,781 feet and base elevation of 6,981 feet ... area averages 396 inches of snowfall per season ... ski season typically runs from November to April ... nearest large airport is Reno International, and the closest small airport is in Truckee
notes: Wikipedia: 8 lifts (5 double + 1 triple + 2 surface counted in OnTheSnow), 800ft vert, 6,981-7,781 elev, 396in snow. Nov-Apr season. RNO closest major. Donner Pass CA has on-site lodge/inn. Tubing yes per Donner Ski Ranch.

exact_quote: Since 1960 Dry Hill Ski Area has been Watertown's favorite family ski, snowboard, and tubing area ... 3 lifts. More specifically, the hill has 1 double chair and 2 surface lifts ... vertical drop is 300′ ... receives 125" of annual snowfall ... season runs from December 02, 2026 to March 14, 2027 ... Watertown International Airport (ART/KART) ... 6 miles from the center of Watertown
notes: Dry Hill: 3 lifts (1 double + 2 surface), 300ft vert, 125in snow, Dec 2 - Mar 14 season. Family ski + tubing area. ART (Watertown Intl) only 6mi; SYR (Syracuse) 65mi for commercial hub.

exact_quote: serviced by a total of four chairlifts, as well as one t-bar surface lift ... averages 400 annual inches of Utah's Greatest Snow on Earth™ across 650 skiable acres and over 1500 vertical feet ... Eagle Point is open Friday-Monday through February 23, for the remainder of the season from March 1-29 we are Friday-Sunday ... nearest practical regional airport is in St. George, which is approximately two hours away
notes: PeakRankings/SkiUtah/Eagle Point: 5 lifts (4 chair + 1 t-bar), 1,500ft vert, 650 acres, 400in snow. Closes March 29; SGU (St. George) closest regional ~2hrs; SLC 3.5hr; LAS 4hr. Beaver UT Tushar Mtns. On-mountain lodging condos.

exact_quote: 4 lifts consisting of 1 rope tow and 3 double chairs ... vertical drop is 550 feet ... average snowfall is 20 inches ... 14 runs across 43 skiable acres ... 14 lighted slopes ... Eagle Rock Resort is a private community located on over 5,000 acres in Hazleton, Pennsylvania ... 18-hole championship golf course ... Snow sports are available for all ages and abilities, including snow tubing
notes: Ski Central/DD Resorts: 4 lifts (3 double + 1 rope tow), 550ft vert, 20in snow, 14 lighted slopes, 43 acres. Tubing yes. Private community resort = lodging on-mountain. AVP (Wilkes-Barre/Scranton) closest commercial, also ABE Lehigh Valley nearby.

exact_quote: Eaglecrest has 36 runs and four lifts ... 1,620 vertical feet of skiing and snowboarding ... extremely stormy climate of the Alaska Panhandle at 1,200 - 2,600 foot elevation on Douglas Island near Juneau ... Eaglecrest's winter season runs from the first weekend in December to the second weekend in April ... 25 minutes from the Juneau airport
notes: Eaglecrest/Alaska.org: 4 lifts, 36 runs, 1,620ft vert, 1,200-2,600 elev, Douglas Island near Juneau. Dec to mid-April. JNU 25min. Backcountry/XC access on island. Municipal-owned. DUPLICATE of slug 'eaglecrest-ski-area'.

exact_quote: Eaglecrest has 36 runs and four lifts ... 1,620 vertical feet of skiing and snowboarding ... extremely stormy climate of the Alaska Panhandle at 1,200 - 2,600 foot elevation on Douglas Island near Juneau ... Eaglecrest's winter season runs from the first weekend in December to the second weekend in April ... 25 minutes from the Juneau airport
notes: DUPLICATE of slug 'eaglecrest' - same Eaglecrest Ski Area Juneau AK. Suggest dedupe stage 24.

exact_quote: small family-oriented ski area located in Skowhegan, Maine ... It has a double chairlift and a rope tow ... over 622 feet (190 m) of vertical drop ... Average Snowfall is 72 inches ... season usually runs late November through late March, sometimes April ... As of 2025, the area is not presently operating
notes: Wikipedia: 2 lifts (double chair + rope tow), 622ft vert, 72in snow, late Nov - late March. WARNING: not operating as of 2025 per Wikipedia. BGR (Bangor) ~60mi; PWM (Portland) ~80mi. Skowhegan ME.

exact_quote: 4 total lifts: 1 Triple, 1 Magic Carpet, 1 Handle-Tow, and 1 Covered Conveyer for the tubing hill ... 600-foot vertical drop, with a base elevation of 10,050 feet and a summit of 10,650 feet ... 275 inches of annual snowfall ... 2025-2026 season opened December 21, 2025 and closes April 12, 2026 ... offers night skiing Wednesday through Saturday ... nearest airport to Echo Mountain Park is Denver International, 60 minutes drive away
notes: Wikipedia/Echo Mtn: 4 lifts (1 triple + magic carpet + handle-tow + tubing conveyor), 600ft vert, 10,050-10,650 elev, 275in snow, Dec 21 - Apr 12 (2025-26). Tubing yes. Night skiing Wed-Sat. DEN 60min. Idaho Springs CO.

exact_quote: volunteer, 501c3 non-profit ski resort located in the Lake Chelan area of Washington State ... approximately 10 miles north of the city of Chelan ... facilities include three rope tows, and a 1,400 foot Poma Lift ... vertical drop of 150 meters ... average of 100 inches annually, primarily from December through March ... closest major airport to Chelan, Washington is Pangborn Memorial Airport (EAT / KEAT) ... 45 miles from the center of Chelan
notes: Wikipedia: 4 lifts (3 rope tows + 1 Poma), 490ft (~150m) vert, 100in snow Dec-Mar season. Tubing yes (Echo Valley Ski & Tubing). EAT (Wenatchee) 45mi closest. Volunteer 501c3 nonprofit.

exact_quote: 10 lifts total (1 High-Speed Six-Pack, 2 Quad, 1 Triple, 3 Double, 1 Surface & 2 Magic Carpets) ... summit of the ski area sits at 10,600 feet above sea level with a lift-served vertical drop of 1,240 feet ... average snowfall of around 300 inches per season ... Season Opening Date: November 14, 2025 Season Closing Date: April 5, 2026 ... fifty miles from downtown Denver, and the nearest airport to Eldora Mountain Resort is Denver International, 84 minutes drive away
notes: Wikipedia: 10 lifts incl 1 high-speed 6-pack, 1,240ft vert, 10,600 summit, 300in snow. 2025-26 Nov 14 - Apr 5. XC Nordic Center on-site. DEN 84min. Nederland CO. POWDR-owned. No on-mtn lodging.

exact_quote: Five doubles and a fixed-grip quad provide uplift; four of these including the quad run from the base to the summit ... 1000 feet of vertical excitement (vertical drop) ... five feet of natural snow a season ... 180 skiable acres with 27 trails ranging from green to blue to black diamond ... located 30 miles north of Scranton
notes: Elk Mountain: 6 lifts (5 doubles + 1 quad), 1,000ft vert, 60in (5ft) snow, 180 acres, 27 trails. AVP (Wilkes-Barre/Scranton) closest commercial ~30mi. Union Dale PA. No on-mtn lodging.

exact_quote: one slow speed double chairlift with 99 chairs that takes skiers from a base altitude of approximately 6,300ft to a summit of about 7,000ft. Additionally, one rope tow serves a beginner slope ... Snobowl has roughly a 700 vertical foot drop ... receives about 60 inches of snow per season plus snow making ... open on weekends and holidays when conditions permit usually from January through February or March ... Sledding, tubing and snow play are also popular here
notes: Travel Nevada/One Life to Ski: 2 lifts (1 double chair + 1 rope tow), 700ft vert, 6,300-7,000 elev, 60in snow + snowmaking. January through Feb/March. Tubing yes. EKO (Elko Regional) closest, just outside city. City-run community hill.

exact_quote: Enchanted Forest is New Mexico's largest and only full service cross country ski area ... 3 miles east of Red River, NM on NM highway 38 in the Carson National Forest ... 33 km of 12-16 ft. wide groomed, signed, and patrolled trails for both classic and freestyle skiing, 18 km of snowshoe-only trails, and 3 km of trails to ski with your dog ... full rental shop, PSIA XC ski lessons, ski patrol ... on-trail overnight yurt rentals
notes: XC ski area - no alpine lifts. 33km groomed XC + 18km snowshoe + 3km dog trails. Yurts for overnight = lodging on mountain. PSIA lessons, rentals. TSM (Taos) closest small; ABQ ~3hr for commercial. Carson NF, Red River NM.

exact_quote: tiny ski resort with just two ski lifts with only 183 metres (601 feet) of vertical descent ... one T-bar lift and one tow-rope system ... base elevation is 5,200 feet and the vertical elevation gain is approximately 640 feet (top to bottom) ... season is usually the second Saturday in December to the first Saturday in April ... nearest commercial flights are at the Eastern Oregon Regional Airport in Pendleton
notes: Wikipedia: 2 lifts (T-bar + rope tow), ~601-640ft vert, 5,200 base. 2nd Sat Dec to 1st Sat April. PDT (Pendleton/Eastern Oregon Regional) closest commercial. Wallowa Mtns Joseph OR. Volunteer-run community hill.

exact_quote: Seven surface lifts shuffle guests around the Four Lakes Alpine Snowsports area ... vertical drop at the Four Lakes Alpine Snowsports winter venue is only 100 feet ... Lisle, Illinois, receives a little over 28 inches of annual snowfall ... 7 trails covering 9 acres ... facility is also equipped with lighting so that guests can enjoy a bit of snow after a long workday
notes: Freeride/Four Lakes: 7 surface lifts (no chairs), 100ft vert, 28in snow, 7 trails 9 acres. Snowmaking required. Night skiing (lighted). ORD (O'Hare) closest major (~25mi). Lisle IL DuPage County. No lodging.

exact_quote: Franconia Village XC Ski Trails offer 30 km of unparalleled scenic vistas amid a variety of beginner-to-expert groomed and ungroomed terrain ... cross-country ski area, so there are no traditional ski lifts. No lift service is available ... Franconia Inn's Ski Shop offers ski, snowshoe, and ice-skate rentals ... lighted ice skating pond, and tubing hill at no additional cost
notes: Ski NH/Franconia Inn: XC area, 0 alpine lifts, 30km groomed trails. Tubing hill yes, ice skating. Lodging at Franconia Inn = on-property. MHT 90min closest commercial; BTV (Burlington) also reachable. White Mountains NH.

exact_quote: Frost Fire Park is located 7 miles west of Walhalla, ND in the beautiful Pembina Gorge ... features a 350-foot vertical drop, 7 runs, quad-chair lift, ski and snowboard rentals, certified instructors for ski and snowboard lessons, and a day lodge with restaurant ... Started in 1976, Frost Fire Park has one quad-seat chairlift and a magic carpet for ski access
notes: Wikipedia/ND Tourism: 2 lifts (1 quad chair + 1 magic carpet), 350ft vert, 7 runs. Snowfall: Walhalla town ~18in but ski season totals higher; mountain-specific not stated. Early December open. GFK (Grand Forks) closest commercial ~85mi. Pembina Gorge.

exact_quote: Garnet Hill is one of an elite group of cross country ski centers with 55 kilometers of expertly groomed trails that provide first-class skiing for both classic and skate skiers alike ... at the edge of the 114,000 acre Siamese Ponds Wilderness area with 75 miles of mapped and marked backcountry ski and snowshoe routes ... shuttle is a free service for the skiers at Garnet Hill Lodge ... three buildings with accommodations including the Log House, The Birches, and The Tea House
notes: Garnet Hill: XC area, 0 alpine lifts (free shuttle service for downhills). 55km groomed + 75mi backcountry trails via Siamese Ponds Wilderness. Lodge accommodations on-site (16 rooms). PSIA lessons, full rentals. ALB closest commercial ~85mi. North River NY Adirondacks.

exact_quote: Giants Ridge is located in Biwabik, Minnesota, midway between Duluth and Ely ... 1 hour north of Duluth and 3 hours north of Twin Cities ... 6 lifts transport the guests ... vertical drop is 500 feet ... 35 alpine ski runs, 60+ km cross country trails, 2 snowboarding terrain parks & a snow tubing park
notes: Wikipedia/Giants Ridge: 6 lifts, 500ft vert, 35 runs, 60+km XC, tubing park, 2 terrain parks. Lodge at Giants Ridge on-property. DLH (Duluth) ~1hr north, closest commercial. MSP 3hrs. Biwabik MN Iron Range.

exact_quote: Gore Mountain has 107 trails and 15 lifts: nine chairlifts, one gondola lift, one J-bar lift, one Poma lift, and two magic carpets ... longest verticals in the Northeast, with a summit elevation of 3,600 feet and a vertical drop of 2,537 feet ... Natural snowfall averages 150 inches annually ... Gore Mountain generally opens for the season in mid- to late November and stays open until mid-April ... Albany airport is one and a half hours from Gore Mountain
notes: Wikipedia/Gore Mtn: 15 lifts (9 chair + 1 gondola + J-bar + Poma + 2 magic carpets), 2,537ft vert, 3,600 summit, 150in snow, mid-Nov to mid-April. ALB 1.5hrs closest. North Creek NY ORDA-operated. XC trails at Ski Bowl. North Creek lodging not on-mountain.
